items.title: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
items.summary: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.

items.title: At least 11 die in Spain wildfire as heatwave continues in Southern Europe
items.summary: Six people were injured in the blaze in Los Gallardos, in the province of Almería.

items.title: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
items.summary: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

中籍學者稱巴丹群島屬中國 菲律賓斥異想天開
items.summary: 中國學者近日宣稱菲律賓最北端巴丹群島屬於中國，菲律賓外交部斥此說法「異想天開」，菲律賓政府強調，允許中國在佬沃設領事館，轄區包括巴丹群島，即是鐵證。  中國暨南大學菲律賓研究中心6月30...…

items.title: 哈米尼官邸遭空襲後首曝光！50秒「斷垣殘壁」現場
items.summary: 伊朗近日首度對外公開一段影片，曝光已故最高領袖哈米尼（Ayatollah Ali Khamenei）官邸遭美國與以色列聯手空襲後的內部景象。哈米尼於2月28日美伊戰爭首日遭擊斃。...…
